clientMessages.content:
Hey <@1470535246842826852> I hope you have been doing well

I wanted to reach out and see how things have been going with your leads

Last we talked you mentioned you were sending out an estimate, how did that go?

Have you been able to meet any more people and give estimates?

If you're open to it, I would love to hop on a call with you to review al the leads coming in to see what we can do to continue improving this for you!
